methodology.allergens: Derived using cloud-kitchen aggregator taxonomy (Celery, Gluten, Crustaceans, Fish, Eggs, Lupin, Molluscs, Mustard, Nuts, Peanuts, Sesame, Soya, Sulphites, Sugared drink, Dairy, Lentils). Flagged only when ingredient is unambiguously an allergen source — no speculative 'might contain' tagging. Recipes with no allergen source are tagged ['NO_ALLERGENS'].
methodology.calories: Estimated from ingredient quantities using USDA/standard food composition per-100g values. Wastage not applied. Rounded to nearest integer. Estimates only — verify with lab testing for regulatory labeling.
methodology.wastage_pct: Wastage is stored as a decimal fraction under the field 'wastage_pct' (e.g. 0.05 = 5%). Null indicates no value in source.

changelog.entry: Moved Bagel from packaging to ingredients on recipes #16, #17, #18, #19, #43 (Phase 1 mechanical fix).
Re-derived allergens for #16, #17, #18, #19, #43 to include Gluten and Sesame Seeds (where applicable) from newly-promoted bagel ingredient; deduplicated and alphabetized.
Recomputed calories_kcal for #16, #17, #18, #19, #43 by adding USDA bagel kcal to existing topping kcal.
Added pending_decisions[] flagging the "Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey)" SKU ambiguity on recipes #21, #38, #39, #41, #55.

Bug fix: Added missing Strawberry (30g, 10% wastage) to Recipe #35 Berry Blast Acai Bowl. Reconciled with Apr 21 master xlsx and Apr 9 costing, both of which list 30g strawberry as a blended ingredient. Calories +10 kcal (old 281 -> new 291). Allergens unchanged (no new allergen added by strawberry).

Renamed ingredient "Maple Syrup (Taste Basics Honey)" -> "Maple Syrup" across 5 recipes: [(21, 'Crispy Chicken Morning Bao'), (38, 'Classic French Toast'), (39, 'Mini Pancakes (5 Pcs)'), (41, 'Kids French Toast'), (55, 'Maple Syrup')]. Operator confirmed SKU is actual maple syrup.

Rebuilt Recipe #11 Levantine Shakshuka base: replaced combined 50g Tomato Paste/Peeled Tomato line with split 15g Tomato Paste (Anna) + 120g Peeled Tomato (canned, crushed). Calories adjusted from 477 -> 468 kcal. Allergens unchanged.
Collapsed Smoked Salmon Toast #4 duplicated build into single canonical portion matching Sunrise & Co and Toast & Co post-merge spec.
Deduped Avocado Hass on #2 Classic Smashed Avo (merged 0.5 Piece + 15 GM into single 0.5 Piece line, 10% wastage).
Normalized Sourdough Bread unit on #1 from 'Piece' to 'Slice'.
Schema v1.0 normalization: consolidated methodology block; unified changelog; dropped cost_per_portion, extras, anomalies, menu_section per-recipe fields.
Resolved 8 residual slashed ingredients to single SKUs across recipes #12, #29 (x2), #43, #47, #49, #52, #53
Generalized bagel ingredient names — bagel type is a customer modifier, not a recipe spec. Applied conservative Gluten+Sesame allergen declaration to all bagel recipes.
Re-tagged allergens to cloud-kitchen aggregator taxonomy; consolidated grain/nut specifics to umbrella tags; dialed back Sulphites to explicit-only; removed Milk tag (use Dairy).
Dialed back allergen tagging to essential only. Recipes without clear allergen sources now marked ['NO_ALLERGENS'].

changelog.change: Alignment fixes: Nutella flagged Dairy+Nuts; Granola flagged Gluten; Medjool Dates Sulphites removed.

recipes.notes: Recipe rebuilt 2026-04-22 - split base into paste + peeled tomato; user to confirm with chef.
